violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Various items were observed held at between 46-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC saved (placed in freezer or walk-in cooler) or discarded items based on time/temp. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
Deli meat was observed past the 7 day date marking. PIC disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Various self service items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels and/or complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including allergens), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloth in the beverage station was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200-400 ppm. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the floor mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Employee cleaned/sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Various desserts on display in the grab n go area packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The drain line (water filtration system) was observed draining below the flood rim of drain trough. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. An air gap is needed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
